calibration_variant.selection_rule: ATR at p75 (75th percentile of BTCUSDT ATR distribution). Distribution-based, non-profit-selected per variant_selection_rule from #3032 prompt contract.
calibration_variant.regime_notes: 27.2% HVC, 24.3% TREND, 48.5% RANGE. Commissioned regime labels: estimated via offline ADX/ATR heuristic, not runtime-derived.

return_metrics.gross_return_note: Replay runner does not emit gross_return for this strategy/adapter combination.
return_metrics.net_return_note: Cannot compute without fees, spread, and slippage data from execution simulator.
return_metrics.profit_factor_note: Gross profit factor from replay runner. < 1.0 indicates net loss before fees.

cost_metrics.fees_note: Fees not modeled by current execution simulator. MEXC spot fees are typically 0.0%/0.0% maker/taker for BTCUSDT. Realistic fee modeling requires separate replay runner extension.
cost_metrics.spread_note: Spread cost not modeled. BTCUSDT MEXC spread is typically <0.01%. Negligible relative to breakout buffer (0.0005) at this trade count.
cost_metrics.slippage_note: Slippage not modeled with order_book_depth_multiplier=10000 and order_size=1.0. At 4 trades in 58h, realistic slippage impact is minimal.

execution_quality.simulator_drift_note: No paper reference exists for comparison. Replay is the only execution surface for this dataset.

evidence_gate.gate_note: All variants fail minimum closed trades (4 < threshold) and minimum profit factor/profit factor thresholds. This is expected for a 58h dataset with 240-minute lookback strategy. Gate thresholds are calibrated for multi-week backtest windows.

verdict.verdict_note: 4 trades over 58h with profit_factor=0.517 does not support economic viability assessment. The dataset is too short for statistical significance. Profit factor < 1.0 at this trade count is not evidence of strategy weakness -- it is evidence of insufficient data.
verdict.next_step: Acquire longer BTCUSDT MEXC dataset (>1 week, >10k candles) with calibrated ATR threshold to assess economic viability.
